productTitle: MikroTik 1G Outdoor Fiber to Copper Converter
name: MikroTik 1G Outdoor Fiber to Copper Converter
title: MikroTik 1G Outdoor Fiber to Copper Converter
short_description: Fiber to Copper converter, Outdoor Case, 12-57V PoE with 802.3af/at Support
description: The MikroTik RBFTC11 is a robust Fiber to Copper converter designed for both indoor and outdoor installations. Unlike typical media converters, it comes in a durable waterproof housing with a lock screw, ensuring protection against harsh environments. Its mounting bracket can be secured from inside the case, adding an extra layer of stability and security for professional deployments. Equipped with one Gigabit SFP port and one 10/100/1000 Mbps Ethernet port, the RBFTC11 supports seamless integration between fiber and copper networks. The device is powered via 12–57V PoE with full IEEE 802.3af/at support, and it includes both a PoE injector and power supply for flexible installation. With a maximum power consumption of just 3 W and passive cooling, it ensures energy-efficient and reliable operation. Certified with CE, EAC, and RoHS, the RBFTC11 is tested to operate in extreme conditions from -40°C to +70°C, making it ideal for industrial environments, remote locations, or outdoor network extensions. Supporting only Gigabit SFP connections, this converter delivers high-performance, long-term stability in demanding networking scenarios.
